messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: BUG: pipeline board is wrong about where work is — misses actively-worked tickets and double-rows a ticket; feed it from an authoritative coordinator source
How it works: A ticket the coder works after a note-based promotion appears at the coder stage
